series_metadata.series_description: Record of employee training and staff development opportunities completed to include both mandatory as designated by policy and non-mandatory topics. Attendance rosters, agendas, curricula, course evaluations/test results and training certificates may be used to document completed training activities.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Maintained electronically and original file may be immediately upon placement onto a server or other mechanism computerized access. Maintain ten years employee terminates service ; Paper: Maintain ten years employee terminates service
